character.name:
Ghostly shadow wraith, isometric pixel art, gothic horror. 
Translucent floating blob spirit, no legs — dark smoky body 
fading into wispy tendrils at the bottom trailing toward the 
ground. Deep navy-black body #050814 with dark blue outline 
#2a3a5a, semi-transparent ghostly feel. Single glowing icy 
blue eye #9cd0ff at center. Small, light, fast-looking silhouette. 
Floats slightly above ground. Colors: near-black body, ice blue 
glow. Ethereal, spectral, unsettling. Crisp pixel art, dark 
background, transparent if possible.
